changelog: Steam Integration: Fixed an issue where shortcuts for Steam games were not being handled correctly.
Process Monitoring: Refined the main application monitoring logic. This adjustment aims to improve reliability in detecting the simulator's status in certain scenarios.
Update System: Rebuilt the update check mechanism to ensure more reliable detection of new versions.
Update Notifications: Improved the 'What’s New' button logic. It will now correctly appear in the menu only once immediately after an update has been installed.
Profile Editor: Renamed 'Launcher Configurator' to 'Profile Editor' to better reflect the purpose of the edit mode.
List Readability: Applications that are toggled off within a profile now have reduced opacity. This makes it much easier to distinguish at a glance which tools are active in your setup.
Visual Polish: Implemented various minor cosmetic tweaks and small UI refinements to improve overall consistency.
